slides.title: What is LOTO?
bullets: Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) controls hazardous energy during equipment servicing and maintenance.
Hazardous energy sources include: electrical, hydraulic, pneumatic, mechanical, chemical, and thermal.
Failure to control hazardous energy is one of the leading causes of serious workplace injuries.
At RGLNG, ALL energy sources must be isolated and verified at zero-energy state before work begins.

slides.title: The 6 Steps of LOTO
right_bullets: NEVER skip or shortcut any step.

slides.title: Golden Rules at RGLNG
bullets: ALWAYS apply your personal lock — one worker, one lock, one key.
NEVER remove another person's lock or tag.
ALWAYS verify isolation yourself — don't rely on verbal confirmation.
ALWAYS follow the documented Energy Control Procedure for the specific equipment.
If in doubt — STOP and ask your supervisor.
